title: erigeron vilmorinii
intro: Erigeron vilmorinii, also known as Vilmorin's fleabane, is a plant species in the daisy family that is native to China and parts of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Erigeron vilmorinii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and decoctions, as well as dried flowers and leaves, to be used in traditional Chinese medicine.
